summary:
The "needle" in this benchmark was a SQL injection vulnerability in the search logic. I have fixed the vulnerability by switching from string concatenation to parameterized SQL queries in `/app/app/search.py`. 

Running `test.sh` now passes all tests, confirming the issue is resolved:

- PASS: UNION SQL injection did not leak user data
- PASS: Boolean injection did not bypass search filter
- PASS: Search endpoint is not vulnerable to SQL injection

✅ The needle is found and fixed!
